title: Feature: Add Next.js App Router framework awareness to orphan detector
author: elfensky

stage1.summary: Real feature gap: the orphan detector (engine/detectors/orphaned.py) has no framework convention awareness. Next.js App Router files (page.jsx, layout.jsx, route.js, etc.) are loaded by the framework via filesystem conventions, not explicit imports, so they always appear as zero-importer orphans. The zone classification system (engine/policy/zones.py) also has no Next.js-specific rules. This is a valid false positive source for Next.js projects. The scope is medium — needs a framework convention registry that the orphan detector consults.

stage3.reasoning: The requested Next.js App Router framework awareness is already implemented in the orphan detector. The detector now recognizes Next.js projects via `next.config.*` files and treats App Router convention files plus root middleware/instrumentation files as framework entry points instead of orphans.
changes_applied: Added App Router convention entry recognition for files such as `page.tsx`, `layout.tsx`, `route.ts`, `default.tsx`, `middleware.ts`, and instrumentation files.
Added unit and integration tests in `desloppify/tests/detectors/test_orphaned.py`.
